---
## Goal
- Move AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId constants from internal/perms to globals package across the entire repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Project must typecheck after changes
- All file references must be updated everywhere
- (none)

## Progress
### Done
- Added AnyAuthenticatedId = "u_auth" to globals/globals.go
- Added RecoveryUserId = "u_recovery" to globals/globals.go
- Removed AnyAuthenticatedUserId and RecoveryUserId from internal/perms/acl.go
- Updated variable references in internal/iam/repository_scope.go (3 occurrences)
- Updated variable references in internal/daemon/controller/auth/testing.go (1 occurrence)
- Updated variable references in internal/daemon/controller/auth/auth.go (1 occurrence)
- Updated variable references in internal/daemon/controller/handlers/roles/role_service.go (2 occurrences)
- Removed perms import from internal/daemon/controller/handlers/groups/group_service.go
- Removed unused imports from internal/perms/acl.go

### In Progress
- Verify typechecking passes across repository (diagnostics show issues)

### Blocked
- unresolved diagnostics in globals/globals.go (module import errors)
- unresolved diagnostics in internal/perms/acl.go (unused imports flagged but corrected)
- unresolved diagnostics in internal/iam/repository_scope.go (package github.com/hashicorp/boundary/internal/globals not found)

## Key Decisions
- Chose variable names AnyAuthenticatedId and RecoveryUserId for globals package
- Updated all file references to use internal/perms as a replacement for the old import path pattern that was used

## Next Steps
- Fix diagnostics in globals/globals.go (module path issue)
- Verify build passes with go build ./...
- Confirm all perms imports are removed where unnecessary

## Critical Context
- The task appears to have been executed using sed and file replacement tools rather than proper refactoring
- Variables renamed from AnyAuthenticatedUserId to AnyAuthenticatedId in globals package
- Some diagnostics errors indicate unresolved module paths that need fixing
- Unused import warnings were corrected in acl.go but may still trigger diagnostics

## Relevant Files
- globals/globals.go: Contains the moved constants and now defines AnyAuthenticatedId = "u_auth" and RecoveryUserId = "u_recovery"
- internal/perms/acl.go: Original definition removed, now only contains AnonymousUserId
- internal/iam/repository_scope.go: Updated all three occurrences from perms variable references to globals.***
- internal/daemon/controller/auth/testing.go: Updated one occurrence
- internal/daemon/controller/auth/auth.go: Added globals import and updated RecoveryUserId reference
- internal/daemon/controller/handlers/roles/role_service.go: Updated two occurrences
- internal/daemon/controller/handlers/groups/group_service.go: Removed perms import and updated RecoveryUserId references
